name: FabricCatalystPromoteStage
description: Promotes items from one stage to the next in a Fabric deployment pipeline using stage display name lookup. Handles the case where the source stage has no items.
author: TechTacoFriday

inputs.name: azureSubscription
inputs.label: Azure Subscription
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure service connection with access to the Fabric tenant. Used to obtain tokens for the Fabric and Microsoft Graph APIs.

inputs.name: deploymentPipelineName
inputs.label: Deployment Pipeline Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the Fabric deployment pipeline without the 'pl_' prefix. For example, if the pipeline is named 'pl_MyProduct', enter 'MyProduct'.

inputs.name: targetStageName
inputs.label: Target Stage Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Display name of the stage to promote items INTO. Must match the stage name configured in the pipeline (e.g. 'uat', 'prod'). Items are promoted from the preceding stage.

inputs.name: enableDiagnostics
inputs.label: Enable Diagnostics
inputs.helpMarkDown: Outputs detailed diagnostic messages to the pipeline log. Use for troubleshooting only.
